audit_result.proof_trace: Block executor validates regular gas limit (L119-127) but completely omits blob gas limit validation. Blob gas is accumulated (L152-154) without any check against MAX_BLOB_GAS_PER_BLOCK, allowing blocks to exceed consensus-mandated blob gas limits.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Attacker submits multiple blob transactions whose cumulative blob gas exceeds MAX_BLOB_GAS_PER_BLOCK. Block executor accepts all transactions, producing an invalid block that violates consensus rules and will be rejected by other nodes.

PROP-5a6a79d5-inv-008.text: Blob transaction gas must not exceed remaining block blob gas limit.
PROP-5a6a79d5-inv-008.assertion: forall tx, block: is_Blob(tx) => total_blob_gas(tx) <= MAX_BLOB_GAS - blob_gas_used
